title: overlay.go SetupInteractiveTerminal initial draw: defer unlock
description:
File: internal/session/client/overlay.go, lines 231-235

SetupInteractiveTerminal() locks the VT mutex inline (not in a goroutine) to do the initial screen draw (Output.Write, RenderScreen, RenderBar). The unlock is manual.

Current risk: If the initial render panics, the mutex stays locked. Since this runs inline (not in a goroutine), the panic propagates up to RunInteractive and crashes the session. The crash itself is acceptable behavior for setup failure, but the mutex should still be defer-unlocked for consistency and to prevent deadlock if a recover is added higher up the stack in the future.

Fix:
1. Convert manual vt.Mu.Unlock() to defer-based unlock (wrap in anonymous func).
2. No recover needed — crashing during setup is appropriate.
